title: telis suavissima
intro: Telis suavissima, also known as the "Sweet False Indigo" or "Butterfly Pea", is a flowering plant native to tropical regions of Asia and the Pacific Islands. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Telis suavissima include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as providing antioxidant protection against cell damage. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
intro_study: According to "Hinyokika kiyo. Acta urologica Japonica", telis suavissima benefits include a statistically significant improvement in sperm density, motility, and the sperm motile efficiency index (SMEI) in patients with male infertility.
